flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Huntington University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($28.2k → $31.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Huntington University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($28.2k → $31.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Huntington University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Huntington University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (73.5% → 83.8%).
